prose:
**Phenol Fukui‐Reactivity** — Fukui reactivity descriptors computed at DFT//input‐geometry: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point evaluation on the user‐supplied phenol.xyz (no relaxation). SCF converged for neutral, cation (charge +1, mult 2), and anion (charge –1, mult 2) states; no warnings reported.

Mulliken‐based Fukui+ (electrophilic) and Fukui– (nucleophilic) indices per atom:
• Fukui+ = [–0.99513677, 0.39933187, 2.1028319, 1.6196806, –0.34200644, –0.28910826, 1.3079753, –0.73391778, –0.27465614, –0.91706058, –0.62991625, –0.29591676, 0.047899336]  
• Fukui– = [0.16201477, 0.048772551, 0.070972379, 0.070498539, 0.026704972, 0.020949414, 0.12351549, 0.082321145, 0.088147788, 0.081105985, 0.080487046, 0.09349577, 0.051014152]  

Most electrophilic site: C (atom 3) with f₊ = 2.1028319  
Most nucleophilic site: O (atom 1) with f₋ = 0.16201477  

Reproducibility:  
• CLI invocation:  
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplu1a82gs/live.json  
• Output JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplu1a82gs/live.json  
• Live log (streaming now): fukui_<timestamp>.out in the working directory  

No warnings were reported.
